images.desc: Dexterous gripper for precise object handling

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Core features accelerating innovation from research to mass production

items.title: Bimanual System
items.desc: Perfectly synchronized bimanual 14DOF control enables human-level complex task execution.

items.title: 1kHz CAN-FD Control
items.desc: Proprietary high-speed communication protocol realizes ultra-precise real-time motion control.

items.title: Affordable Platform
items.desc: Reasonably priced at $6,500(USD). Dramatically lowers the barrier to entry for research and industrial applications.

items.title: Lightweight & Powerful
items.desc: Despite its light 5.5kg arm weight, it boasts a powerful peak payload of up to 6kg.

items.title: Open Source Ecosystem
items.desc: Fully compatible with ROS2 and supported by a rich open-source community for rapid development.

items.title: Built for AI
items.desc: Provides a hardware architecture optimized for deploying Sim-to-Real reinforcement learning models.

stats.title: Core Specifications
stats.subtitle: Libertron complies with the OpenArm standard specifications

why_korea.title: Why buy from Libertron?
why_korea.subtitle: Libertron Co., Ltd. provides a reliable purchasing experience<br className="hidden md:block"/>based on extensive hardware and software design expertise.

items.title: Flexible Sales Options
items.desc: We support fully assembled products for research and custom purposes, assembly kits, and B2B quote-based sales methods.

items.title: Direct Delivery & Installation Demo
items.desc: For domestic deliveries within Korea, we deliver the product safely in person and support the necessary steps for OpenArm installation.

items.title: Transparent & Reasonable Pricing
items.desc: We support the founding principles of OpenArm, guaranteeing the best quality and a reasonable pricing system. (Refer to the product details page for the domestic A/S policy.)
